metadata.description: Personal engineering starterkit: a stack-agnostic plan/implement/review pipeline, per-stack conventions, and distilled book knowledge as on-demand skills.

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic engineering pipeline: architect, engineer, reviewer (3-lens fan-out), testdoctor agents plus the plan lifecycle skills.

plugins.name: stack-go
plugins.description: Go conventions (style, declaration order, test structure, error contract, code organization) and Go engineering knowledge (common mistakes, concurrency, performance).

plugins.name: stack-flutter
plugins.description: Flutter/Dart conventions: state management discipline, forbidden constructs, test structure, error contract.

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Distilled engineering doctrine from foundational books: DDD, SQL antipatterns, PostgreSQL performance, MongoDB modeling, testing, production stability, data systems, software design.
